body.title: Ticket schema: add role field (apprentice/builder/creator/master/guru)
body.result: role field added to ticket schema with VALID_ROLES + _infer_role(); worker→role inference; display in list; Granny deferral uses role inference; 23 tests
body.description:
Add a `role` field to the cc_queue ticket schema with values: apprentice, builder, creator, master, guru. Backward-compat: when `role` is absent, infer from `worker` (claude→master, dicksimnel→builder, igor→apprentice). Granny reads `role` at dispatch time; falls back to `worker` field for old tickets.

**Affected files:** CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS/cc_queue.py (schema + add/show), devices/granny/daemon.py (read role at dispatch)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; external state principle (role persists with ticket, not in-memory)
**Scope boundary:** schema addition + backward-compat inference only; Granny dispatch logic is T-granny-dispatch-role-map
**Completion criteria:** `cc_queue.py add` accepts `role` field; `cc_queue.py show` displays it; old tickets without role field still load cleanly; unit tests cover inference fallback
